_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Surprisingly, the K14-Scf; Scf flox/gfp; K14Cre mice displayed white hair with dark skin...indicating that even though Scf is expressed under a K14 promoter, K14-Scf was unable to rescue the hair depigmentation
details: Unable to rescue hair depigmentation in Scf knockout mice despite producing epidermal hyperpigmentation, resulting in white hair with dark skin phenotype
